tree.name: Drake Powell
tree.note: UNC wing, drafted #22 with ATL's pick. Received in 3-team Porzingis trade along with Terance Mann.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#22) via ATL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: ATL traded Mann and Drake Powell to BKN; ATL traded Niang and 2031 2nd (CLE own) to BOS; BKN traded cash to BOS; BOS traded Porzingis to ATL.
assetsGivenUp.note: Atlanta's own 2025 1st-round pick, received by BKN in the Porzingis 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN sent cash to Boston to facilitate the deal.
